next_action: Keep file-backed source-backed memory as the auditable substrate and run a bounded benchmark repair attempt so memory/control changes are judged by measured behavior instead of premature infrastructure.
overclaim_boundary: File-backed memory is not the breakthrough by itself, and a benchmark suite still must not claim lift until the evidence passes the gate.
rationale: The current gap is not a missing vector store; goal 021 shows the immediate product need is using repair records and reruns to prove whether the layered memory/control/eval loop improves Codex behavior.
